visualTheme: Cinematic Digital Painting — dramatic golden hour, painterly brushstrokes, warm saturated colors, concept art quality

prompts.lessonTitle: Start Here — What To Expect And How To Use This Program
prompts.qwenPrompt: Cinematic digital painting, a confident African American woman in her late 20s standing at a crossroads on a wide sun-drenched boulevard in Central Florida, wearing a tailored navy blue blazer over a crisp white blouse and charcoal slacks, her left hand resting on a leather portfolio tucked under her arm, her right hand slightly raised as she gazes toward a modern city skyline ahead with glass towers catching golden light. A contemporary university campus entrance with sleek architecture and palm trees frames the left side of the composition. The road ahead splits into multiple paths symbolizing possibility and choice. Dramatic golden hour lighting casts long warm shadows across the pavement, painterly brushstrokes visible throughout, atmospheric haze softening the distant buildings, warm saturated colors with amber and deep blue tones dominating the palette, concept art quality, rich and atmospheric. Lush tropical landscaping with sabal palms and bird of paradise plants line the boulevard edges. No text, no words, no letters. Wide composition, 16:9 aspect ratio. NOT a photograph, NOT photorealistic.
